CurrentIssues.ID: BackingPropertyNaming:HolographicEntities.kt:HolographicEntities$private var _internalEntityHoloBases: Map<KClass<out LivingEntity>, HolographicBase<out LivingEntity>>? = null

BackingPropertyNaming:SkyHanniRenderPipeline.kt:SkyHanniRenderPipeline$private val _pipe: RenderPipeline = RenderPipelines.register( RenderPipeline.builder(snippet) .withLocation(Identifier.fromNamespaceAndPath(SkyHanniMod.MODID, this.name.lowercase())) .withVertexFormat(vFormat, vDrawMode).apply { // One or the other, never both blend?.let(this::withBlend) ?: withCull?.let(this::withCull) vertexShaderPath?.let { withVertexShader(Identifier.fromNamespaceAndPath(SkyHanniMod.MODID, it)) } fragmentShaderPath?.let { withFragmentShader( Identifier.fromNamespaceAndPath( SkyHanniMod.MODID, it ) ) } sampler?.let(this::withSampler) uniforms.forEach(this::withUniform) withDepthWrite(depthWrite) withDepthTestFunction(depthTestFunction) }.build(), )
Kdoc:BitsApi.kt:BitsApi$/** * We can't increase [BitsApi.bits] here since that difference is alr accounted for, * if we do, it will be counted twice */
Kdoc:BossType.kt:BossType$/** * TODO dungeon mini bosses * shadow assassin * lost adventurer * frozen adventurer * king midas * in blood room: bonzo, scarf, ?? * f7 blood room giants * */

Kdoc:CorpseApi.kt:CorpseApi$/** * TODO fix the bug that readItemAmount produces two different outputs: * §r§fEnchanted Book -> §fEnchanted * §fEnchanted Book §r§8x -> §fEnchanted Book * * also maybe this is no bug, as enchanted book is no real item? */

Kdoc:CustomScoreboard.kt:/** * TODO LIST * - countdown events like fishing festival + fiesta when its not on tablist * - choose the amount of decimal places in shorten nums * - heavily optimize elements and events by only updating them when absolutely needed */

Kdoc:ForagingTracker.kt:ForagingTracker$/** * this is a failsafe in the event of runes lacking sufficient NEU repo data to automagically * fetch their correct internal names, and thus translating their in-game names into internal * names literally */

Kdoc:FossilExcavatorApi.kt:FossilExcavatorApi$/** * TODO fix the bug that readItemAmount produces two different outputs: * §r§fEnchanted Book -> §fEnchanted * §fEnchanted Book §r§8x -> §fEnchanted Book * * also maybe this is no bug, as enchanted book is no real item? */

Kdoc:RenderEntityOutlineEvent.kt:RenderEntityOutlineEvent$/** * Constructs the event, given the type and optional entities to outline. * * * This will modify {@param potentialEntities} internally, so make a copy before passing it if necessary. * * @param theType of the event (see [Type] */
Kdoc:Renderable.kt:Renderable.Companion$/** Bottom Layer must be bigger then the top layer */

Kdoc:ScoreboardPattern.kt:ScoreboardPattern$/** * Sometimes when the scoreboard updates, it only updates half way, * causing some lines to become mixed with other lines -> broken. * This should already get handled fine but sometimes these errors still occur with some lines way too often. * This pattern is to catch those lines. */
Kdoc:TabWidget.kt:TabWidget.FULL_TRAPS$/** * REGEX-TEST: Full Traps: #1, #2, #3 * REGEX-TEST: Full Traps: #2, #3 * REGEX-TEST: Full Traps: #3 * REGEX-TEST: Full Traps: None */
Kdoc:TabWidget.kt:TabWidget.NO_BAIT$/** * REGEX-TEST: No Bait: #1, #2, #3 * REGEX-TEST: No Bait: #2, #3 * REGEX-TEST: No Bait: #3 * REGEX-TEST: No Bait: None */
Kdoc:TimeUtils.kt:TimeUtils$/** * We replace the line here, because the user might want color month names */
MaxLineLength:ColoredBlockCompat.kt:ColoredBlockCompat.Companion$block.glassBlock == this.block || block.glassPaneBlock == this.block || block.woolBlock == this.block || block.clayBlock == this.block
MaxLineLength:EstimatedItemValueCalculator.kt:EstimatedItemValueCalculator$"Wrong item rarity detected in estimated item value for item ${stack.hoverName.formattedTextCompatLeadingWhiteLessResets()}"
MaxLineLength:MiscConfig.kt:MiscConfig$@ConfigOption(name = "Color Particle Warning", desc = "§c§lThis can break particle Coloring in parts of Skyblock where it is done properly.§f")
MaxLineLength:MiscConfig.kt:MiscConfig$@SearchTag("Fixes Hypixel not setting colored particles properly such as Slayer Specific Spawn Particles or Motes Fix Colored Particles")
MaxLineLength:MobFilter.kt:MobFilter$(baseEntity is Pig || baseEntity is Horse) && illegalEntitiesPattern.matches(armorStand.name.formattedTextCompatLessResets()) -> MobResult.illegal

MaxLineLength:SkyBlockItemModifierUtils.kt:SkyBlockItemModifierUtils$ChatUtils.debug("Gemstone type is null for item name().formattedTextCompatLeadingWhiteLessResets()§7: ('$newKey' with '$key' = '$value')")

MultilineLoop:BetterContainers.kt:BetterContainers$for (x in 0 until w) { val p = mask.getRGB(x, y) val a = p ushr 24 and 0xFF if (a < 10) continue out.setRGB(x, y, (a shl 24) or (colour and 0xFFFFFF)) }

MultilineLoop:SkyblockStat.kt:SkyblockStat.Companion$for (entry in entries) { val matchResult = pattern(entry).matchMatcher(line) { groupOrNull("value")?.replace("[,%]".toRegex(), "")?.toDouble() } ?: continue entry.lastKnownValue = matchResult entry.lastSource = type entry.lastAssignment = SimpleTimeMark.now() break // Exit the inner loop once a match is found }

MultilineLoop:TabWidget.kt:TabWidget.Companion$when { PLAYER_LIST.pattern.matches(header) -> if (playerListFound) removeIndexes.add(index - removeIndexes.size) else playerListFound = true INFO.pattern.matches(header) -> if (infoFound) removeIndexes.add(index - removeIndexes.size) else infoFound = true }

NoNameShadowing:HoppityCollectionStats.kt:HoppityCollectionStats${ val displayAmount = it.amount.shortFormat() val operationFormat = when (milestoneType) { HoppityEggType.CHOCOLATE_SHOP_MILESTONE -> "spending" HoppityEggType.CHOCOLATE_FACTORY_MILESTONE -> "reaching" else -> "" // Never happens } // List indexing is weird existingLore[replaceIndex - 1] = "§7Obtained by $operationFormat §6$displayAmount" existingLore[replaceIndex] = "§7all-time §6Chocolate." return existingLore }
PropertyName:RepoPatternManager.kt:RepoPatternManager$// idk what this is for private const val insideTest = false

PropertyName:VersionConstants.kt:VersionConstants$// Do not use this mc version as its reflective of the compile time version // And might not be correct at run time // We use it for the auto updater only var MC_VERSION = "1.21.10" private set
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:AshfangFreezeCooldown.kt:AshfangFreezeCooldown$by RepoPattern.pattern( "ashfang.freeze.cryogenic", "§cAshfang Follower's Cryogenic Blast hit you for .* damage!", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:BingoCardReader.kt:BingoCardReader$by patternGroup.pattern( "hiddengoal", ".*§7§eThe next hint will unlock in (?<time>.*)" )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:BingoNextStepHelper.kt:BingoNextStepHelper$by patternGroup.pattern( "crystal.obtain", "Obtain a (?<name>\\w+) Crystal in the Crystal Hollows\\.", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:BlazeSlayerDaggerHelper.kt:BlazeSlayerDaggerHelper$by RepoPattern.pattern( "slayer.blaze.dagger.attunement", "§cStrike using the §r.+ §r§cattunement on your dagger!" )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:DianaProfitTracker.kt:DianaProfitTracker$by patternGroup.pattern( "burrow.dug", "(?:§eYou dug out a Griffin Burrow!|§eYou finished the Griffin burrow chain!) .*", )

RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:DungeonArchitectFeatures.kt:DungeonArchitectFeatures$by patternGroup.pattern( "puzzle.fail.quiz", "§4\\[STATUE] Oruo the Omniscient§r§f: (?:§.)*(?<name>\\S*) (?:§.)*chose the wrong .*", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:DungeonCopilot.kt:DungeonCopilot$by patternGroup.pattern( "countdown", ".* has started the dungeon countdown. The dungeon will begin in 1 minute.", )

RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:HalloweenBasketWaypoints.kt:HalloweenBasketWaypoints$by patternGroup.pattern( "basket", "^(?:(?:§.)+You found a Candy Basket! (?:(?:§.)+\\((?:§.)+(?<current>\\d+)(?:§.)+/(?:§.)+(?<max>\\d+)(?:§.)+\\))?|(?:§.)+You already found this Candy Basket!)\$", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:MaxwellApi.kt:MaxwellApi$by patternGroup.pattern( "gui.noselectedpower", "(?:§.)*Visit Maxwell in the Hub to learn", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:QuiverApi.kt:QuiverApi$by chatGroup.pattern( "cleared", "§aCleared your quiver!|§c§lYour quiver is now completely empty!", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:SlayerRngMeterDisplay.kt:SlayerRngMeterDisplay$by patternGroup.pattern( "changeditem", "§aYou set your §r.* RNG Meter §r§ato drop §r.*§a!", )
RepoPatternRegexTestMissing:TerracottaPhase.kt:TerracottaPhase$by patternGroup.pattern( "start", "§c\\[BOSS] Sadan§r§f: So you made it all the way here... Now you wish to defy me\\? Sadan\\?!", )
